properties.name: Giza Pyramid Complex
properties.summary: Pyramids, temples and necropolis structures near Cairo.
properties.quest: Measure how architecture expresses belief and administration.

properties.name: Karnak Temple Complex
properties.quest: Follow layers of kingship, ritual and expansion.

properties.name: Valley of the Kings
properties.summary: Royal burial landscape on the west bank of the Nile.
properties.quest: Ask how hidden spaces can still project power.

properties.name: Abu Simbel
properties.summary: Rock-cut temples associated with Ramesses II.
properties.quest: Ask how monuments project power across distance.

properties.name: Saqqara
properties.summary: Necropolis including the Step Pyramid of Djoser.
properties.quest: Compare stepped pyramid form with later smooth pyramids.

properties.name: Amarna
properties.quest: Study what happens when power tries to redesign religion and city form.
